Title: Cart subtotal incorrectly calculated for specific product
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Add product ID 7 to cart; 2. Navigate to /cart; 3. Increase quantity to 2; 4. Observe subtotal
Actual Result: Subtotal calculated as unit price × (quantity - 1); correct quantity shown but wrong price
Notes: Isolated to product ID 7; other products calculate correctly

Title: Product specification shows incorrect RAM value
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Navigate to /products; 2. Click Dell Inspiron 15; 3. Scroll to Specifications; 4. Find RAM row
Actual Result: Specifications table shows '4GB DDR4' contradicting product description
Notes: Discrepancy only on PDP; listing card unaffected

Title: Primary product image fails to load on PDP
Preconditions: User navigates to specific product PDP
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Click on Lenovo IdeaPad Flex 5 (product ID 3); 2. Observe main image
Actual Result: Main image fails to load; fallback placeholder shown
Notes: Invalid URL for first gallery image; fallback works; thumbnail nav present

Title: Sidebar search for 'corsair' returns fewer results than brand filter
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Type 'corsair' in sidebar search; 2. Note count; 3. Clear; 4. Select Corsair from brand filter; 5. Compare count
Expected Result: Both methods should return same Corsair products
Actual Result: Sidebar search returns fewer Corsair products than brand filter
Notes: Issue specific to Corsair brand; other brands unaffected

Title: Price Low to High sorts Components category descending
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Select Components category; 2. Select Price Low to High; 3. Observe order
Actual Result: Components sorted highest to lowest; opposite of selected sort
Notes: Isolated to Components category; other categories sort correctly

Title: Product page title contains typographical error
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Navigate to Apple MacBook Air 13 M2 PDP (product ID 6); 2. Observe H1 title
Actual Result: Title reads 'Apple MacBoook Air 13 M2' (extra 'o' in MacBook)
Notes: Listing card and URL slug correct; typo only in H1 heading

Title: Cart quantity can exceed product stock level
Preconditions: In-stock product in cart with qty 1
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Add in-stock product to cart; 2. Navigate to /cart; 3. Click + repeatedly beyond stock level
Expected Result: Quantity capped at stock level; + button disabled at max
Actual Result: Quantity increases indefinitely beyond stock; + button never disabled
Notes: PDP quantity correctly capped; cart page lacks same validation

Title: Postcode field not validated on checkout submission
Preconditions: Cart has items; user on checkout page
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Navigate to checkout; 2. Fill all fields except Postcode; 3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Validation error shown for Postcode field
Actual Result: Form submits without postcode; no error shown despite asterisk indicating required
Notes: Postcode has error state but validate() does not check it

Title: Wishlist items beyond 8 lost on page refresh
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Add 9 products to wishlist; 2. Confirm 9 shown; 3. Refresh page; 4. Check wishlist
Actual Result: 9th item disappears silently after refresh; wishlist truncated to 8
Notes: localStorage init applies slice(0_8); add function has no cap; inconsistent behaviour

Title: Login form does not validate password field as required
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Enter demo@qualicoretech.com; 2. Leave password empty; 3. Click Sign In
Actual Result: Form proceeds to auth check; no password field error; generic credential error shown
Notes: validate() only checks email; password presence not client-side validated

Title: Registration allows weak passwords without minimum length check
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Fill name and email; 2. Enter password 'abc'; 3. Confirm 'abc'; 4. Submit
Actual Result: Registration succeeds with 3-character password despite placeholder showing 8-char minimum
Notes: validate() checks presence only; no minimum length enforced

Title: Cart badge count can desync from actual cart count
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Add item to cart; note badge; 2. Go to /cart; 3. Remove item; 4. Observe badge
Actual Result: Badge may briefly show previous count after item removal
Notes: badgeCount is separate state; removeFromCart does not explicitly update it

Title: Checkout accepts card numbers with only 4 digits
Preconditions: Cart has items; user on checkout
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Fill all fields; 2. Enter '1234' in card number; 3. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error: card number must be 16 digits
Actual Result: Order accepted with 4-digit card number; redirect to order success
Notes: Validation checks length >= 4 after stripping spaces; should be 13-19

Title: Mobile menu does not close when tapping outside
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open app on mobile viewport; 2. Open hamburger menu; 3. Tap page content outside menu
Actual Result: Menu remains open; must use ✕ button or navigate to close
Notes: Click-outside handler exists for user dropdown but not for mobile menu

Title: Product count shows stale loading state on back navigation
Preconditions: User on products page with filter applied
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Apply category filter; 2. Navigate back via browser back button; 3. Observe count text immediately
Actual Result: Count briefly shows '...' loading state before updating
Notes: Loading state triggered unconditionally on mount with 400ms timeout
